2605.06535.title: Sparkle: Realizing Lively Instruction-Guided Video Background Replacement via Decoupled Guidance
2605.06535.paper_summary: In recent years, open-source efforts like Senorita-2M have propelled video editing toward natural language instruction. However, current publicly available datasets predominantly focus on local editing or style transfer, which largely preserve the original scene structure and are easier to scale. In contrast, Background Replacement, a task central to creative applications such as film production and advertising, requires synthesizing entirely new, temporally consistent scenes while maintaining accurate foreground-background interactions, making large-scale data generation significantly more challenging. Consequently, this complex task remains largely underexplored due to a scarcity of high-quality training data. This gap is evident in poorly performing state-of-the-art models, e.g., Kiwi-Edit, because the primary open-source dataset that contains this task, i.e., OpenVE-3M, frequently produces static, unnatural backgrounds. In this paper, we trace this quality degradation to a lack of precise background guidance during data synthesis. Accordingly, we design a scalable pipeline that generates foreground and background guidance in a decoupled manner with strict quality filtering. Building on this pipeline, we introduce Sparkle, a dataset of ~140K video pairs spanning five common background-change themes, alongside Sparkle-Bench, the largest evaluation benchmark tailored for background replacement to date. Experiments demonstrate that our dataset and the model trained on it achieve substantially better performance than all existing baselines on both OpenVE-Bench and Sparkle-Bench. Our proposed dataset, benchmark, and model are fully open-sourced at https://showlab.github.io/Sparkle/.
2605.06535.paper_summary_zh: 近年來，像 Senorita-2M 這樣的開源努力推動了視頻編輯朝向自然語言指令發展。<lb/>然而，目前公開可用的數據集主要集中在本地編輯或風格轉換，這些數據集在很大程度上保留了原始場景結構，並且更容易擴展。<lb/>相對而言，背景替換這一任務對於電影製作和廣告等創意應用至關重要，需要合成全新且時間一致的場景，同時保持準確的前景與背景互動，這使得大規模數據生成變得更加具有挑戰性。<lb/>因此，由於缺乏高質量的訓練數據，這一複雜任務仍然在很大程度上未被充分探索。<lb/>這一差距在表現不佳的最先進模型中表現得尤為明顯，例如 Kiwi-Edit，因為包含此任務的主要開源數據集，即 OpenVE-3M，經常生成靜態且不自然的背景。<lb/>在本文中，我們將這一質量下降追溯到數據合成過程中缺乏精確的背景指導。<lb/>因此，我們設計了一個可擴展的管道，能以解耦的方式生成前景和背景指導，並進行嚴格的質量篩選。<lb/>基於這一管道，我們介紹了 Sparkle，一個包含約 140K 視頻對的數據集，涵蓋五個常見的背景變更主題，以及 Sparkle-Bench，迄今為止專為背景替換量身定制的最大評估基準。<lb/>實驗表明，我們的數據集及其上訓練的模型在 OpenVE-Bench 和 Sparkle-Bench 上的表現均顯著優於所有現有基準。<lb/>我們提出的數據集、基準和模型均已在 https://showlab.github.io/Sparkle/ 上完全開源。
2605.06535.author: Ziyun Zeng et.al.
2605.06535.authors: Ziyun Zeng, Yiqi Lin, Guoqiang Liang, Mike Zheng Shou
